title: Add Trello member and assignee support to the skill
body:
## Summary
The skill cannot currently assign people to cards, unassign them, or help the operator resolve board members safely. This blocks common task-management workflows.

## Goal
Add member-aware support focused on card assignment, not full workspace administration.

## Scope
- list members available on a board
- resolve members by id, username, or exact display name where safe
- assign a member to a card
- unassign a member from a card
- surface clear ambiguity errors when multiple people match

## Requirements
- do not guess between similarly named members
- prefer board-scoped member lookup where possible
- keep scripts small and explicit
- do not implement board invitation/admin flows in this issue

## Acceptance criteria
- shared member resolution helpers are added to trello_api.py
- scripts exist for listing board members and assigning/unassigning card members
- ambiguous member matches produce a clear clarifying error
- tests cover resolver logic and request construction
- SKILL.md gains examples for member operations

## Notes
This should stop at card assignment. Board invites/admin changes can be evaluated separately later if we truly need them.
